initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  CAST(COUNT(results.position) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(results.driverId) AS completion_rate
FROM races
JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId
WHERE races.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT 
    COUNT(results.driverId) AS total_drivers,
    COUNT(results.position) AS completed_drivers
FROM results
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE races.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT 
    COUNT(results.driverId) AS total_drivers,
    COUNT(results.position) AS completed_drivers,
    CAST(COUNT(results.position) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(results.driverId) AS completion_rate
FROM races
JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId
WHERE races.date = '1983-07-16';

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(results.driverId) AS total_drivers,
    COUNT(results.position) AS completed_drivers,
    CAST(COUNT(results.position) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(results.driverId) AS completion_rate
FROM results
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE races.date = '1983-07-16';

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_drivers,
    SUM(CASE WHEN results.position IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_drivers,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN results.position IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM results
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE races.date = '1983-07-16';
